    G

    Game - Class in model
    represents an arcade game available for customers to play.
    Game() - Constructor for class model.Game
     
    Game(int, String, int, int) - Constructor for class model.Game
     
    GameDAO - Class in dao
    Data Access Object (DAO) for the Game table.
    GameDAO() - Constructor for class dao.GameDAO
     
    getAllCustomers() - Method in class dao.CustomerDAO
    Retrieves all customers from the database.
    getAllGames() - Method in class dao.GameDAO
    Retrieves all games from the database.
    getAllPrizes() - Method in class dao.PrizeDAO
    Retrieves all prizes from the database.
    getConnection() - Static method in class db.DBConnection
     
    getCostPerPlay() - Method in class model.Game
     
    getCustomerByEmail(String) - Method in class dao.CustomerDAO
    Retrieves a single customer by their email address.
    getCustomerById(int) - Method in class dao.CustomerDAO
    Retrieves a single customer by their ID.
    getCustomerId() - Method in class model.Customer
     
    getEmail() - Method in class model.Customer
     
    getGameId() - Method in class model.Game
     
    getGameName() - Method in class model.Game
     
    getName() - Method in class model.Customer
     
    getPrizeId() - Method in class model.Prize
     
    getPrizeName() - Method in class model.Prize
     
    getPurchaseHistory() - Method in class dao.PurchaseDAO
    Retrieves the full purchase history using an INNER JOIN across three tables.
    getStock() - Method in class model.Prize
     
    getTicketCost() - Method in class model.Prize
     
    getTickets() - Method in class model.Customer
     
    getTicketsRewarded() - Method in class model.Game
